creator: dean@odyssey.apana.org.au
text:
On Tue, 8 Jan 2008, Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> Maintainer of mail/dcc-dccd,
>
> Please note that PR ports/119454 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.

Users of dcc-dccd should now be updating via ports, as advised by the 
vendors. The dcc-update binary should be used which will do the job and 
leave config files in place.

If the issue is with dcc-update deleting config files, then the vendor 
needs to know about it.

Regards,

d.
